message:
refactor(web): make SSE channel parsing case-insensitive, improve test structure

web/sse.rs:
- parse_event_stream_channel() now uses eq_ignore_ascii_case() for channel
  name matching, accepting "ALL", "Deltas", "SIGNALS", etc.
- Improved error message clarity for invalid channels
- Added two new tests: case_insensitive parsing + invalid channel errors

web.rs:
- Added #[cfg(test)] gating to helper functions only used in tests
  (parse_stream_max_hz, EventStreamChannel, epoch_ms_now, make_stream_frame,
  frame_to_sse, event_matches_pane)
- Refactored ApiResponse tests to use JSON serialization assertions

tests/web.rs:
- Renamed timeout parameter to read_timeout for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
